batch_summary: In the kitchen, a heartbroken Phoebe admits to Monica that she misses her former musical partner, Leslie, who previously dumped her. Despite her hurt, Phoebe fondly recalls their time playing music together. A flashback shows Phoebe joining Leslie on stage at a coffee shop to harmoniously sing "Sticky Shoes" to an appreciative crowd. Meanwhile, Ross and Rachel attend a fashion lecture together, where Ross affectionately whispers to Rachel how glad he is to be there and tells her she is pretty.
